Critical Issues
🚨
SAT Conversion Rate Collapsed — 11.32% → 5.07% (−6.25pp)
SAT leads grew 62% YoY (167K → 293K) but conversions dropped 27% (18,676 → 14,836). Spend up 17.9%. A massive lead quality/funnel problem. Audit post-lead CRM, landing pages, and counsellor capacity.
🚨
VP Lead Volume Down 42% YoY (271K → 157K)
Vidyapeeth Admission leads dropped 42% despite only 27% spend cut. CPL worsened ₹313 → ₹396. VP conversion rate improved slightly (6.95% → 5.97% — note: deduped). Volume recovery is the #1 priority for VP admissions.
🚨
YouTube CPT ₹1,56,203 — 66× Worse than Search Brand
YouTube consumed ₹85.9L with just 55 conversions. Demand Gen CPT ₹26,155. Combined: ₹2.69Cr for 756 conversions. Search Brand delivers the same conversions at ₹2,347 CPT. Immediate reallocation needed.
Watch Points
⚠️
NSAT CPT Worsened 57% YoY (₹3,447 → ₹5,418)
NSAT conversions down 25.6% while spend rose 17%. Pmax (₹7,271 CPT) is dragging NSAT efficiency. Search Brand at ₹2,065 CPT is 3.5× better. Shift NSAT budget mix toward Search Brand.
⚠️
SAT Phase 2 — Highest CPL ₹296 (vs Phase 1 ₹167)
SAT Phase 2 CPL is 78% higher than Phase 1. Phase 3 (largest at 62% of SAT budget) CPL ₹206 vs Phase 1 ₹167. Rebalance: move 15–20% from Phase 2/3 to Phase 1.
⚠️
Facebook Conv Rate Only 3.33% with High CPT ₹7,446
Facebook drives 20% of leads (157K) but only 3.33% convert. Use Facebook purely for awareness/lead volume — pair with Search Brand for conversion capture.
Bright Spots
✅
Search Brand — Best Performer: CPT ₹2,347, Conv% 7.96%
₹53.7Cr spend, 287K leads, 22,866 conversions. Best CPT, best conversion rate. Scale aggressively — check search impression share headroom. Every ₹1Cr reallocated here from YouTube/DGen adds ~425 conversions.
✅
Overall CPL Improved ₹247 → ₹231 (−6.5%)
Total spend fell but CPL improved — better media efficiency at top of funnel. Challenge is in mid/bottom funnel conversion. CPL improvement will compound further with channel mix optimization.
CMO Action Plan
⚡ Immediate (0–2 weeks)
1
Pause YouTube, Cut Demand Gen 50%
Free ₹1.5Cr+. Redirect to Search Brand across NSAT + SAT. Expected gain: +600 conversions/month.
2
SAT Funnel Audit
293K leads → 14,836 conversions (5.07%). Check CRM response time, landing page A/B, lead scoring, counsellor bandwidth.
3
VP Creative Refresh
42% lead drop needs new creative angles and fresh lookalike audiences.
📋 Strategic (1–3 months)
4
Scale Search Brand
Best CPT ₹2,347. Audit impression share loss — scale budget by 30–40% targeting high-intent keywords.
5
SAT Phase Budget Rebalance
Move 20% of Phase 3 budget to Phase 1 (CPL ₹167 vs ₹206). Test at smaller scale first.
6
NSAT Pmax Optimization
277K leads but CPT ₹7,271. Asset group quality review, more conversion signals, restructure campaigns to improve conv rate.
